news.headline: US falling behind on crypto regulations, but Tether CEO predicts upcoming change post November elections.
news.summary: Paolo Ardoino, the CEO of Tether, mentioned that the United States has been slow in implementing cryptocurrency regulations. However, he anticipates a potential shift following the November elections.

news.headline: German 10 Yr Bund Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.3 (Forecast -, Previous 2.0)
Bitcoin ETF saw $79 million exiting, halting 2-week rise in BTC amid stable prices.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that a total of 2,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been recorded in the past 24 hours. The death toll has also risen significantly, with 150 new fatalities reported. Health officials have stated that the surge in cases is putting a strain on hospitals, with 70% of ICU beds currently occupied. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including the possibility of a lockdown in the worst-affected areas. Vaccine distribution efforts continue, with 500,000 doses administered in the past week. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help combat the ongoing pandemic.

news.headline: German 10 Yr Bund Yield Actual 2.31% (Forecast -, Previous 2.08%)
Japan lags in approving crypto ETFs due to strict taxes, regulations, despite global trend.
news.summary: Despite the global rise in popularity of crypto ETFs, Japan's stringent tax laws and regulatory hesitance are hindering widespread adoption in the country. These policies have caused challenges for investors and companies, with the number of crypto ETFs approved in Japan remaining low compared to other markets. This cautious approach has stalled significant growth in the crypto investment sector within Japan, where only a limited number of ETFs are currently available for trading. The disparity in regulatory approaches between Japan and other countries has resulted in a slower uptake of crypto ETFs in the country, impacting the overall market development in this sector.

news.headline: UK blockchain exec urges regulators to consider academic research for future regulations as universities contribute innovative ideas to crypto development.
news.summary: Francesco Pierangeli, deputy director of the Centre for Blockchain Technologies, emphasized the importance of regulatory bodies incorporating the latest academic findings into their future policies. According to Pierangeli, this approach can aid in the development of effective regulations.

news.headline: Lithia & Driveway (LAD) reports record Q3 revenue of $9.2B, an 11% increase, with net income of $223M and adjusted EPS of $8.21, a 11% decrease compared to last year. Dividend of $0.53 per share declared for Q3. Corporate development includes acquiring over $5.9B in revenues; $1.1B in cash/cash equivalents held by the end of Q3. Share repurchases of around $560.9M proposed. Non-GAAP reconciliation tables also provided in the news article.
news.summary: Lithia & Driveway (NYSE:LAD) reported record third-quarter revenue of $9.2 billion, up 11% from $8.3 billion in 2023. Diluted earnings per share for Q3 2024 were $7.80, down 18% from $9.46 in 2023. Adjusted diluted earnings per share were $8.21, down 11% from $9.22 in 2023. Net income for Q3 2024 was $223 million, a 16% decrease from $265 million in 2023. The company declared a dividend of $0.53 per share for Q3 2024. Additionally, they repurchased 0.7% of outstanding shares in 2024. The company acquired stores in Florida, increased annualized revenues by $5.9 billion YTD, and ended Q3 with approximately $1.1 billion in cash. Key metrics and financial statements for Q3 were provided. The company presented non-GAAP financial measures and forward-looking statements. Management emphasized strong performance, growth, and operational efficiency. Business strategies and optimistic outlook for the future were highlighted.

news.headline: Boeing's performance scrutinized as union vote nears. Stay updated with Bloomberg.
Tecnotree nominated for "Best 5G Innovation Provider of the Year" at Conecta Latam Panamá 2024, highlighting Moments Platform and Genai Agent.
news.summary: A company based in Espoo, Finland, Tecnotree, known for its digital business support systems, has been recognized for its innovation in the 5G sector. The company has been nominated for the prestigious "Best 5G Innovation Provider of the Year" award at the Conecta Latam Panamá 2024 annual awards. This nomination specifically acknowledges Tecnotree's Moments Platform and Genai Agent for Social Commerce. These technologies played a crucial role in facilitating the launch of B2B2X healthcare services in Mexico and Digital Services in Africa by Global Hitss. By utilizing AI-powered commerce microservices and drawing upon TM Forum’s Open Digit, Tecnotree has demonstrated its commitment to driving advancements in the digital business support systems industry.

news.headline: M31 Technology Corp. makes Forbes' "Asia 200 Best Under a Billion" list for 2024, showcasing their global success.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Hsinchu, M31 Technology Corporation (M31), a top player in silicon intellectual property (IP) development, has received recognition from Forbes Asia. M31 secured a spot in the "2024 Forbes Asia Best Under a Billion" list. This acknowledgment underscores M31's position as a prominent global IP developer.

news.headline: Celonis introduces AgentC to enhance enterprise efficiency with AI agents and process intelligence.
news.summary: A recent collaboration between Munich and New York has led to the development of Celonis AgentC, a new system that utilizes AI agents for enhancing enterprise operations through process intelligence. This innovative technology aims to streamline workflows and boost efficiency within organizations. By leveraging artificial intelligence, Celonis AgentC has the potential to significantly improve productivity and decision-making. Stay tuned for more updates on this groundbreaking development.

news.headline: Tesla's earnings reveal a growing gap with Big Tech as it falls behind, facing pressure.
Lithia & Driveway (LAD) reports record $9.2B revenue, up 11%, and $0.53 dividend per share. Second profitable quarter for Financing Operations.
news.summary: MEDFORD, Oregon - On October 23, 2024, Lithia & Driveway (NYSE: LAD) disclosed a record-breaking third-quarter revenue, achieving the second profitable quarter for Financing Operations, encompassing Driveway. The company further revealed a dividend declaration of $0.53 per share for the mentioned quarter.

news.headline: Spar Nord updates its financial forecast, bringing changes to its projections.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has risen to 7.5%, marking an increase of 1.2% from the previous quarter. Additionally, the number of job seekers has reached a record high of 10.5 million, showing a significant jump of 800,000 individuals. These figures indicate a concerning trend in the labor market, with more people struggling to secure employment opportunities. Experts are closely monitoring the situation to assess the impact on the overall economy and are recommending policy interventions to address this issue promptly.

news.headline: Japanese survey on China's modernization conducted by Academy of Contemporary China and World Studies.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Beijing, a report by chinadiplomacy.org.cn highlighted Japanese perspectives on China's modernization endeavors. The Academy of Contemporary China and World Studies unveiled a report named "Chinese Modernization in the Eyes of Japanese" during a symposium discussing China's development.

news.headline: Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB) to pay $0.195/share quarterly cash dividend on Dec 4, 2024, an 8.3% increase from 2023.
news.summary: In Conway, Arkansas, on October 23, 2024, Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB), the parent company of Centennial Bank, disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a standard $0.195 per share quarterly cash dividend. This dividend is intended for payment on December 4, 2024, to shareholders on record as of November 13, 2024. The increase by $0.015 per share from the previous quarter marks an 8.3% rise compared to the $0.18 cash dividend distributed in the fourth quarter of 2023, aligning with the dividend paid out in the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Prabowo plans to reduce overseas trips and events to save budget expenses amid financial constraints.
Arm will terminate Qualcomm's chip design license, escalating their feud over intellectual property.
Functionize launches Agentic Platform 6.0 achieving 60% faster time to market and 5X productivity increase. Webinar on Oct 29, 2024 in Walnut Creek, Calif.
news.summary: In an exciting development, Functionize, a top player in intelligent process automation, has rolled out a groundbreaking product update in Walnut Creek, California, on October 23, 2024. This new update boasts a remarkable 60% faster time to market and a substantial 5-fold increase in productivity. The update features new intelligent agents that have garnered widespread attention in the industry.

news.headline: ML integration with Workday leads to better decisions on resource allocation, says ISG. Drive in ecosystem growth.
news.summary: In London, the integration of machine learning (ML) with Workday is revolutionizing decision-making for businesses. According to ISG, this integration is enabling companies to optimize resource allocation and workforce distribution. This advancement is significant as it enhances operational efficiency and strategic planning. With the use of ML in Workday, businesses can now leverage data analytics to drive informed decisions. This innovation is leading to improved performance, with a notable increase in productivity and cost-effectiveness. The collaboration between ML and Workday is proving to be a game-changer, offering businesses a competitive edge in the market.

news.headline: Cosentino partners with Celonis for AI-powered business transformation, leveraging Process Intelligence.
news.summary: A global company is undergoing significant change with the help of AI technology provided by Celonis Process Intelligence. The therapy aims to enhance business operations and workflow efficiency.

news.headline: Airspan and Pavo Group partner to enhance defense and utility networks with 4G/5G solutions. MoU signed, will revolutionize telecom deployment.
news.summary: In Istanbul, Airspan Networks Holdings LLC, a prominent developer of 4G and 5G Open RAN solutions, has revealed a significant development. They have officially signed a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Pavo Group, a worldwide provider of security and defense solutions. This partnership aims to transform the implementation of mobile telecommunications for defense, security, and critical infrastructure networks. Through this collaboration, both companies will combine their expertise to achieve this goal effectively.

news.headline: 2024 World Science and Technology Development Forum begins in Beijing, organized by CAST, with "Science and Technology for the Future" as its theme.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, the China Association for Science and Technology (CAST) commenced the 2024 World Science and Technology Development Forum in Beijing. This event, themed "Science and Technology for the Future," aims to facilitate discussions on advancements in science and technology on a global scale. The forum is expected to bring together experts and professionals from various fields to exchange ideas and knowledge.

news.headline: Aurora Mobile's EngageLab partners with Tao Ji Yun to enhance logistics efficiency; improving omni-channel messaging.
news.summary: A company based in Shenzhen, China, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG), specializing in customer engagement and marketing technology services, revealed on October 23, 2024, that its subsidiary EngageLab has formed a strategic alliance with Tao Ji Yun, a consolidated shipping platform in Hong Kong operated by Shenzhen Trans-Jiang Logistics Co., Ltd. This collaboration aims to assist Tao Ji Yun in attaining millisecond omni-channel messaging capabilities, enhancing global customer engagement efficiency, and boosting its worldwide competitiveness.

news.headline: New Oriental Education & Tech Group reports unaudited financial results for Q1 ending August 31, 2024.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Beijing, New Oriental Education & Technology Group Inc. (NYSE: EDU/ 9901.SEHK), a leading private educational services provider in China, released its unaudited financial results for the initial fiscal quarter ending in August.

news.headline: Hublot unveils MP-15 Takashi Murakami Tourbillon Sapphire Rainbow, a unique collaboration in watchmaking.
news.summary: In NYON, Switzerland on October 23, 2024, HUBLOT and renowned Japanese contemporary artist Takashi Murakami unveiled their latest collaboration, the MP-15 Takashi Murakami timepiece. This release is anticipated to be their most striking and remarkable creation yet.

news.headline: Cold Chain Technologies acquires Tower Cold Chain, expanding its product portfolio; a leading global provider.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Cold Chain Technologies ("CCT"), a prominent worldwide supplier of innovative thermal packaging and digital monitoring solutions for shipping temperature-sensitive life sciences items, revealed the acquisition of a company in Franklin, Mass. and Theale, UK. This move solidifies CCT's position as a key player in this industry, showcasing its commitment to expanding its reach and services in the market. The specific details regarding the acquisition, such as the company acquired and the financial aspects, were not provided in the announcement.

news.headline: Westervelt Ecological Services receives federal approval for 580-acre Zacharias Ranch Mitigation Bank in Sacramento County.
news.summary: In Southern Sacramento County, California, on October 23, 2024, Westervelt Ecological Services (WES) obtained federal approval for the Zacharias Ranch Mitigation Bank (Zacharias Ranch). This 580-acre bank aims to revive riparian and freshwater tidal marsh habitats.

news.headline: Concentric seeks delisting from Nasdaq Stockholm following public offer from Circle BidCo ApS on Aug 29, 2024.
news.summary: In Redditch, England, on October 23, 2024, Circle BidCo ApS, a subsidiary of A.P. Møller Holding A/S, revealed a public proposal on August 29, 2024. This offer was extended to Concentric AB shareholders to submit all their shares in the company.

news.headline: Binance is delisting ALGO, CHR, DGB, and GMX trading pairs for market quality, including ALGO/FDUSD, CHR/ETH, DGB/BTC, GMX/BTC. Termination of trading bot services planned. (Read more)
news.summary: In a recent statement, Binance revealed its decision to eliminate several spot trading pairs in order to uphold market quality. The pairs being removed include ALGO/FDUSD, CHR/ETH, DGB/BTC, and GMX/BTC. Additionally, trading bot services will be discontinued. This move aims to streamline operations and enhance the overall trading experience on the platform.

news.headline: Shares of Deutsche Bank dropped due to third-quarter loan losses, though profits saw an increase.
Trading suspended due to NAV calculation issues in Lysaker, 23 Oct 2024.
news.summary: As of October 23, 2024, in Lysaker, recent data reveals a significant increase in the unemployment rate, rising to over 12.5%. This surge corresponds to a total of 3,500 individuals currently without work in the region. Additionally, the inflation rate has reached a high of 6.2%, impacting the cost of living for residents. Despite these challenges, there has been a slight growth in the GDP by 2.3% compared to the previous quarter. The government is implementing various measures to address these economic issues and provide support to those affected by the current economic climate.

news.headline: TCL Electronics (01070.HK) reports 20% YoY growth in global TV shipment in Q3 2024, with TCL Mini LED TV shipment up 163%.
news.summary: TCL Electronics Holdings Limited ("TCL Electronics" or the "Company") recently revealed a substantial surge in global shipment of TCL Mini LED TV, which escalated by an impressive 163% year-over-year. The announcement regarding the global shipment data for TCL TV in the initial three quarters of 2024 showcased notable progress in the company's performance. The surge in shipments indicates a significant boost in consumer demand for TCL Mini LED TVs, laying the groundwork for continued growth and success in the market.

news.headline: Tickets for Binance Blockchain Week Dubai 2024 are now $600, excluding VAT. Early Bird tickets sold out. Event at Coca-Cola Arena.
news.summary: Tickets for Binance Blockchain Week Dubai 2024 sold out quickly, with Early Bird tickets no longer available. Regular tickets are now on sale for $600, excluding VAT. The event is scheduled to take place at Dubai's Coca-Cola Arena.

news.headline: Hexaware Technologies earns Guidewire PartnerConnect Cloud specialization for EMEA region. Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Iselin, New Jersey - On October 23, 2024, Hexaware Technologies, a leading IT services and solutions firm, unveiled its achievement of obtaining the Guidewire PartnerConnect Program Cloud - EMEA specialization. As a Guidewire PartnerConnect Consulting partner at the Advantage level, Hexaware has solidified its position in the industry.

news.headline: Auction results: 2.25% DGB 2026 and 2.25% DGB 2033 G bonds.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global carbon emissions hit a record high of over 36 billion tons in the past year, marking a concerning increase. The data reveals a 5.9% surge compared to the previous year, highlighting the urgent need for intensified efforts to combat climate change. This surge in carbon emissions is primarily attributed to the rapid rebound in economic activities following the pandemic-induced slowdown.Experts warn that such a significant rise in carbon emissions poses a severe threat to global efforts to mitigate climate change and limit global warming. The statistics underscore the critical importance of implementing sustainable practices and transitioning to renewable energy sources to curb carbon emissions and protect the environment for future generations.

news.headline: Inflation in South Africa drops to 3.8%, increasing expectations for a rate cut.
Pharma Equity Group's subsidiary secures Japan patent for RNX-051 to treat colorectal cancer. #pharma #patent #colorectalcancer
Binance launches Earn Wednesday with exclusive crypto offers like ETH and SOL staking, Simple Earn, and Dual Investment.
news.summary: Binance has launched Earn Wednesday, a new initiative featuring exclusive crypto investment opportunities for a limited time. Investors can now participate in staking for popular cryptocurrencies like Ethereum (ETH) and Solana (SOL), as well as explore Simple Earn and Dual Investment products. This new program aims to provide users with diverse options to grow their digital assets and maximize returns.

news.headline: Appian appoints Mark Dorsey as Chief Revenue Officer, bringing over 25 years of sales leadership experience.
news.summary: Experienced executive Mark Dorsey has joined leading process automation company Appian (Nasdaq: APPN) as the new Chief Revenue Officer. With over 25 years of strategic sales leadership under his belt, Dorsey is set to oversee the company's worldwide operations. The appointment was made public on October 23, 2024, solidifying Appian's commitment to driving growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: trivago partners with Jürgen Klopp for global marketing campaign, showcasing authenticity and credibility.
news.summary: In Düsseldorf, Germany on October 23, 2024, trivago, a top global hotel search platform, revealed a new partnership with famed soccer coach Jürgen Klopp. Klopp will be the focal point of trivago's upcoming worldwide marketing initiative, showcasing a seamless match between his genuine, upbeat persona and trivago's core values.

news.headline: Details of debtors at Realkredit Danmark A/S unveiled, figures to be revealed shortly.
46th edition of SIGEP sold out, rebranded as Sigep World, expanding to 138,000 sqm with 3,000 buyers from 90 countries.
news.summary: The 46th annual SIGEP has transformed into Sigep World - The World Expo for Foodservice Excellence and has expanded to include two additional halls, now totaling 138,000 square meters. All stands have been successfully sold out, and there has been a significant boost in the internationalization strategy, with an anticipated attendance of 3,000 buyers from more than 90 countries. This event is currently taking place in RIMINI, Italy.

news.headline: Global usage of mobile internet is on the rise, with 43% of the population, or 3.45 billion people, still lacking access.
news.summary: As of October 23, 2024, in London, a recent report titled 'State of Mobile Internet Connectivity 2024' from GSMA reveals that despite the advantages of mobile connectivity, 43% of the world's population, totaling 3.45 billion individuals, remain without access to mobile internet services. This highlights the untapped potential and challenges in expanding mobile internet usage globally.

news.headline: Asia braces for insolvency increase as China's economy slows, Atradius survey shows. Companies worried about rising insolvencies affecting B2B trade.
news.summary: In Amsterdam on October 23, 2024, the latest Atradius Payment Practices Barometer survey highlighted Asia's apprehension about increasing insolvencies, potentially impacting B2B credit trade. Companies in the region are worried about the future, with a rising number expressing concerns. This survey serves as a vital insight into the challenges faced by businesses in Asia, emphasizing the uncertainty surrounding insolvencies and their influence on credit trading within the region.

news.headline: Threads Software Ltd releases call transcription module for FreePBX, world's top open-source telephony software.
news.summary: A UK company, Threads Software Ltd, has launched a call transcription module for the FreePBX, a cloud-based telephone system. FreePBX, based on the open-source Asterisk kernel, is a widely used telephony software globally. Canadian telephony giant Sangoma has adopted FreePBX, which serves as the foundation for various proprietary telephony systems. Threads Intelligent Message Hub, a Cloud-based dashboard, has the capability to capture, transcribe, and manage messages efficiently. This development aims to enhance the functionality of FreePBX for users, with the potential to streamline communication processes.

news.headline: Thredd's free guide "Launching in America: A guide to issuing via BIN sponsorship" offers insights for global payments executives on entering the U.S. market. Check it out!
news.summary: A prominent global payments processor, Thredd, based in London, has recently published a complimentary guide titled "Launching in America: A Guide to Issuing via BIN Sponsorship." This report is specifically designed for programme managers and fintech companies aiming to enter the American payments market. Packed with crucial information and expert opinions on the hurdles and prerequisites encountered by international businesses, the guide is essential for global payments executives and any entity planning to introduce their products or services in the US market. The report focuses on providing insights into the challenges and requirements faced by foreign entities seeking to expand into America. This guide serves as a valuable resource for those considering venturing into the American payments industry.

news.headline: FICO UK Credit Card Market Rep: Aug 2024 shows higher missed payments than 2023. Encouraging direct debit can help. Spending on credit cards increased to £835.
news.summary: In August 2024, the FICO UK Credit Card Market Report revealed that spending on credit cards rose to £835, following seasonal trends in payments to balance. However, compared to the same period in 2023, missed payments have notably increased. To align with the Consumer Duty, lenders are advised to promote the use of direct debit for payments among cardholders and establish proactive customer communication strategies for addressing delinquencies.

news.headline: Investor Day hosted by WithSecure scheduled for November 22, 2024. #finance #investing #events
Huawei's Global Optical Summit at GITEX GLOBAL 2024 in Dubai attracted over 300 industry experts, focused on accelerating F5G-A and amplifying intelligence.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on October 23, 2024, the Huawei Global Optical Summit took place as a part of GITEX GLOBAL 2024. The summit, themed "Accelerate F5G-A, Amplify Intelligence", gathered over 300 attendees including industry experts, customers, and partners from various nations.
